testcase.name: test_exact[GCJ02-WGS84-input0-expected0]

failure.message: cupy_backends.cuda.api.driver.CUDADriverError: CUDA_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_PTX_VERSION: the provided PTX was compiled with an unsupported toolchain.

testcase.failure:
src = <COORD_CRYPTO_SPACE.GCJ02: 'GCJ02'>, dst = <COORD_CRYPTO_SPACE.WGS84: 'WGS84'> input = (array([121.09626928, 121.09626928]), array([30.60860437, 30.60860437])), expected = (121.0917077, 30.6107779)
@pytest.mark.cuda @pytest.mark.parametrize( ("src", "dst", "input", "expected"), [ (COORD_CRYPTO_SPACE.GCJ02, COORD_CRYPTO_SPACE.WGS84, gcj02_array, wgs84), (COORD_CRYPTO_SPACE.BD09, COORD_CRYPTO_SPACE.GCJ02, bd09_array, gcj02), (COORD_CRYPTO_SPACE.BD09, COORD_CRYPTO_SPACE.WGS84, bd09_array, wgs84), ], ) def test_exact(src, dst, input, expected): in_lon = cp.asarray(deepcopy(input[0]), cp.float64) in_lat = cp.asarray(deepcopy(input[1]), cp.float64) print(cp.asnumpy(in_lon)) module = pyxis_cuda.CryptoCuda() > module.crypto_exact("double", in_lon, in_lat, src, dst, 1e-17, 100)
tests\test_crypto_cuda.py:42: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ src\pyxis_cuda\_crypto_cuda.py:66: in crypto_exact fn = self.module.get_function(f"{crypto_from.lower()}_to_{crypto_to.lower()}_exact_cuda_{dtype}") cupy\\_core\\raw.pyx:487: in cupy._core.raw.RawModule.get_function ??? cupy\\_core\\raw.pyx:100: in cupy._core.raw.RawKernel.kernel.__get__ ??? cupy\\_core\\raw.pyx:117: in cupy._core.raw.RawKernel._kernel ??? cupy\\_util.pyx:64: in cupy._util.memoize.decorator.ret ??? cupy\\_core\\raw.pyx:546: in cupy._core.raw._get_raw_module ??? cupy\\cuda\\function.pyx:261: in cupy.cuda.function.Module.load_file ??? cupy_backends\\cuda\\api\\driver.pyx:216: in cupy_backends.cuda.api.driver.moduleLoad ??? _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
> ??? E cupy_backends.cuda.api.driver.CUDADriverError: CUDA_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_PTX_VERSION: the provided PTX was compiled with an unsupported toolchain.
cupy_backends\\cuda\\api\\driver.pyx:63: CUDADriverError

testcase.name: test_datum_compensate_cuda

failure.message: cupy_backends.cuda.api.driver.CUDADriverError: CUDA_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_PTX_VERSION: the provided PTX was compiled with an unsupported toolchain.

testcase.failure:
@pytest.mark.cuda def test_datum_compensate_cuda(): x = cp.array([469704.6693] * 2, dtype=cp.float64) y = cp.array([2821940.796] * 2, dtype=cp.float64) module = DatumCompensateCuda() > module.datum_compensate_cuda("double", x, y, 400.0, 6378137.0, 500000.0, 0.0)
